updates.tweet_text:
Nice fast Failed Breakdown in #ES_F. 7535/7528 was the support as posted. I posted watch for traps of 7528. We swept below 7528, recovered for a Failed Breakdown, and ran +28. 7558, 7570, 7590 if ES wants more today.

7528/35 fails (weak zone now), 7509 is next down https://t.co/FAmrn7ahD0
updates.notes: All prices (7535, 7528, 7558, 7570, 7590, 7509) are morning-plan levels or observations of completed price action; no new actionable levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text:
Now its pure mid-day chop and as always, we do not trade chop. Trades only happen on massive volatility expansions, then on Failed Breakdowns. 7528 Failed Breakdown was long trigger. We swept it, and ran +28.

7558, 7570, 7590 if ES wants more. 7535/28=support. Weak. 7509 below https://t.co/LqRWyW6jrZ
updates.notes: 7528 is a hindsight FBD reference; 7558 is not in plan but listed casually as directional target; 7570/7590/7535/7509 are all morning-plan reaffirmations. No new actionable levels named.

updates.tweet_text:
After a pure chop day in #ES_F, overnight traders finally spoiled with vol. As always, I only trade vol, I do not trade chop. Per newsletter, the Failed Breakdown of 7427 triggered long, and we are +20

Plan today: 7427=support (weak now). 7462, 7472 above. bears control<7509 https://t.co/JjTdj84Sbv
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7427, 7462, 7472, 7509) are already in the morning plan. No new actionable levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text: @zero_baalance Was a good long! We had a fairly significant breakdown though so hopefully we can see some more red. Its been a bad few weeks with lack of volatility and too much green, making it tough for day traders. Need that red so we can grow accounts too (day traders always prefer red)

updates.tweet_text:
7427 Failed Breakdown continue to pay out heavily in #ES_F and as repeated non-stop, volatility makes our job very easy. We just trapped 7427 again down to 7416, recovered, pushed.

Targets given were 7452 (hit), 7462 (hit), 7472, 7509 next. Just ride your runner now https://t.co/kyfPMqK075

updates.tweet_text: @joeo1s Yes, when volatility spikes like this we tend to get those big failed breakdowns. Its why even though I am a long only trader, I make far more in red markets than green markets. If it were my choice we'd always be in a bear market!
